# 904 Dumpster

> Locally-owned roll-off dumpster rental and junk removal service in Jacksonville and Northeast Florida from $299. Same-day delivery, flat-rate pricing, and 10, 15, and 20-yard containers for home cleanouts, renovations, construction, and demolition.

904 Dumpster is a licensed franchise hauler operating across Duval, Clay, St. Johns, and Nassau counties in Florida. Based in Jacksonville, the company serves homeowners, contractors, property managers, and commercial businesses with roll-off dumpsters, junk removal, and demolition services. All pricing includes delivery, pickup, disposal, and the standard rental period.

## Pricing and booking

- [Dumpster Rental Pricing in Jacksonville FL](https://www.904dumpster.com/dumpster-rental-pricing-jacksonville): Flat-rate dumpster pricing across all sizes, includes delivery, pickup, and disposal
- [Book Online](https://app.icans.ai/customer-portal/904dumpster/book/): Direct booking portal with live availability
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.904dumpster.com/frequently-asked-questions): Permits, weight limits, prohibited items, rental period extensions

## Dumpster sizes

- [10-yard dumpster rental](https://www.904dumpster.com/10-yard-dumpster-rental): Small projects, single-room cleanouts, roofing under 1,500 sq ft
- [15-yard dumpster rental](https://www.904dumpster.com/15-yard-dumpster-rental): Medium projects, garage cleanouts, kitchen renovations
- [20-yard dumpster rental](https://www.904dumpster.com/20-yard-dumpster-rental): Large projects, whole-house cleanouts, major renovations
- [Dumpster size guide](https://www.904dumpster.com/dumpster-size-guide): How to pick the right size by debris type and project

## Services

- [Residential dumpster rental in Jacksonville](https://www.904dumpster.com/residential-dumpster-rental-jacksonville-fl): Home cleanouts, garage clean-outs, estate cleanouts, spring cleaning
- [Commercial dumpster rental in Jacksonville](https://www.904dumpster.com/commercial-dumpster-rental-jacksonville-fl): Business and retail waste removal
- [Construction dumpster rental in Jacksonville](https://www.904dumpster.com/construction-dumpster-rental-jacksonville-fl): Roofing, renovation, and new build debris
- [Junk removal in Jacksonville](https://www.904dumpster.com/junk-removal-jacksonville-fl): Full-service junk hauling
- [Demolition services in Jacksonville](https://www.904dumpster.com/demolition-services-jacksonville-fl): Shed, deck, fence, and partial demo
- [Concrete disposal dumpster in Jacksonville](https://www.904dumpster.com/concrete-disposal-dumpster-jacksonville-fl): Heavy-material containers for concrete, brick, and masonry

- [Home cleanout guide for Jacksonville](https://www.904dumpster.com/blog/complete-guide-home-cleanout-jacksonville)
